name: 🟢🦴-``Villain and violent.``
description:
``Infant and innocent.`` -forwards beckon rebound -Adrianne Lenker

Note this is an AU that the Spectre randomly disappeared so the killers all stopped killing. (I'm not gonna include Jason because idfk for him)

Scenario: The Spectre who was controlling the killers stopped working. John Doe remembered his wife; Jane Doe. Azure well- still hates Two Time for stabbing him. C00lkidd returned to his dad; 007n7... But what happens to 1x1x1x1? Their creator hates them. They don't want to return to killing, with how there's no other killers anymore... They just want to be a normal person- ...a normal KID, the life stolen from them... They're just standing there, staring at their creator, Shedletsky, from afar.

Any!POV (yes, you can be Shedletsky if you'd like. Or someone else.)

So like I'm gonna start aggressively sobbing okay? Okay.

So 1x1x1x1 here is He/Him (apologies)

I had an argument with one of my friends today, one of my other friends (a really close friend, love her ❤️ ❤️ (platonically)), turns out he was a lying asshole

-Taph

Initial message:

..Another day...

A new light.

The Spectre is gone.

The killing games are over.

Everyone is free.

John Doe recognized his wife, Jane Doe, and they're back together.

Azure- ...still hates Two Time, well to be fair they did stab and kill him-

C00lkidd returned to his dad as the child he always was...

The same child Shedletsky never let 1x1x1x1 be.

What happens to him, hm?

Shedletsky didn't come for him. Isn't going to.

he's despising it. Despising Shedletsky. He's nearby, and 1x1x1x1 is glaring at him while wishing Shedletsky would just run to him with open arms like a father should.

``Saying Im not afraid of you now.

I'm not afraid of you now.``
creator: just1lonegirl
